name: case-solvers
description: A bd-backed, parallel-capable coding workflow: /case (frontier model) authors stories/epics in Beads and /refine revises them, /board renders the backlog, /solve (any model tier) implements one in an isolated git worktree, /evaluate merges it after human review. Dependency-aware; bd stays hidden behind the commands. Requires the bd (Beads) CLI.

interface.shortDescription: A bd-backed, parallel-capable coding workflow: author, refine, solve, and evaluate stories.
